packageRules.description: The fake registry used by swift_package_registry_example only hosts swift-collections 1.1.x, which is incompatible with swift-async-algorithms >= 1.1.4 (requires swift-collections >= 1.5.0).

The BCR macOS Buildkite runner ships Swift 6.0.x and cannot parse swift-log's manifest from 1.9.0 onward (declares swift-tools-version >= 6.1). The bzlmod e2e test's workspace must stay pinned at swift-log < 1.9.0 so SPM resolves to 1.8.0 (tools 6.0). See #2262.
